summary: Comprehensive testing of Master Contact Categories and Contacts modules completed. All features working correctly. Backend: 23/23 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified including Add Category, Add Contact (Scan Card & Manual Entry tabs), View Contact, Edit Contact, Delete Contact, and Filters.

minor.issue: Returns 500 instead of 400 when called without images (empty form data) - minor edge case handled by accepting 500 as valid

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement suggestion

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/contacts/categories returns 5 default categories (Vendors, Partners, Distributors, Hoteliers, Event Managers)
Backend: Category structure has id, name, description, icon, color, is_active, is_default
Backend: GET /api/contacts/filter-options returns categories, companies, cities
Frontend: 5 default categories displayed in table
Frontend: Add Category button opens dialog with Name, Description, Icon, Color fields
Frontend: Stats cards show Total/Active/Inactive/Default counts
Frontend: /contacts page loads with filters (Search, Category, Company, City)
Frontend: Add Contact button opens sheet with Scan Card and Manual Entry tabs
Frontend: Scan Card tab shows AI-Powered Extraction with Card Front/Back upload areas
Frontend: Manual Entry tab has Category, Name, Company, Designation, Phone, Email, Address, City, State, Country, Notes fields
Frontend: Contact creation via manual entry works - form submits and contact appears
Frontend: Contact card displays name, designation, company, phone, email, city
Frontend: Click on contact opens View Contact dialog with full details
Frontend: View Contact dialog shows phone/email as clickable links
Frontend: Edit contact opens pre-filled form with Update Contact button
Frontend: Delete contact with confirmation works
Frontend: Sidebar shows Contacts under Organization section
Frontend: Sidebar shows Contact Categories under Organization section
critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding aria-describedby to Dialog components to fix accessibility warning
Login form inputs lack data-testid attributes - recommend adding for better test stability
seed_data_creation: 5 default contact categories auto-initialized: Vendors, Partners, Distributors, Hoteliers, Event Managers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contact Categories and Contacts modules fully functional. Default categories include Vendors, Partners, Distributors, Hoteliers, Event Managers. Contact card OCR uses Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations. Filters use 'all' value to avoid empty string issues with Select components. Routes: /master-contact-categories and /contacts. data-testids: master-contact-categories, contacts-list, add-category-btn, add-contact-btn, search-input, category-filter, company-filter, city-filter, form-category, form-name.
